audit_items.proof_trace: sass_import_get_error_message() (line 203) contains zero allocations — it is a one-line getter that returns entry->error without calling malloc/calloc/strdup or any allocation wrapper. The property's assertion domain is empty, so it is vacuously satisfied. Memory for the error field is allocated in sass_import_set_error() and correctly freed by sass_delete_import(), neither of which is part of this function.
